final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: concept-art-game
Asset type: game concept art, cinematic illustration
Primary request: epic fantasy dragon lair scene inside an active volcano's lava cave
Scene/backdrop: deep volcanic cavern interior with flowing molten lava on walls, distant cave entrance with moonlight streaming in
Subject: massive ancient dragon perched atop a mountain of gold coins and treasure, deep crimson and black interwoven scales, wings spread covering half the cavern space, eyes emitting intense golden glow
Style/medium: realistic fantasy illustration, Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, epic cinematic style
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, dramatic perspective emphasizing scale and grandeur
Lighting/mood: complex interplay of warm orange-red lava glow on scales, single cool moonbeam from cave entrance creating color temperature contrast, dramatic and epic atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson, orange-gold, black dominant, warm-cool contrast
Materials/textures: realistic dragon scales with light reflections, molten lava flow, gleaming gold coins, ancient magical artifacts, glowing magical gems, weathered armor
Constraints: preserve the epic scale and D&D fantasy aesthetic, maintain realistic rendering quality
Avoid: cartoonish style, flat lighting, low detail, cluttered composition, plastic textures
